name: the live wrapper matches sources but acquires nothing when the fetch cache is empty (honest, non-fabricating)
command: ID=L561A04; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-live.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --cache emptyfc --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z 2>e.err; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; grep -qE 'sources_matched=[1-9].* sources_fetched=0 acquired_total=0' e.err && echo live-empty-cache-nothing 1>&2
